versions.changelog: Initial release. Real CBS (Statistics Netherlands) neighborhood data for population and jobs. Commute routes pre-calculated. Coverage includes Amsterdam, Amsterdam-Noord, Zuidoost/Bijlmer, Zuidas, Westpoort, Zaandam, Purmerend, Diemen, Amstelveen, Haarlemmermeer, and Schiphol (EHAM) with all piers.
Fixed oversized demand bubbles at major employment nodes (Schiphol, Aalsmeer, etc.).
Added demand coverage for Uithoorn — residents and commute pairs now included.
